explanation: Transport acceptance is progress only; it is not acknowledgement.
Downloaded evidence does not satisfy acknowledgement debt on its own.
Older generations remain auditable only after the case has moved on.
Only current-generation acknowledgement on the live tuple may clear debt.
Audited no-ack exception may settle the debt when the algorithm explicitly allows it.
Evidence bound to an older truth tuple may not calm the new case posture.
Any new material change reopens the current continuity obligation and current acknowledgement debt.
